pillars.title: Your own quiniela, in minutes
pillars.description: Create a private group, pick your mode and scoring config, invite with a single link. No spreadsheets, no confusion — just a code your friends tap once.

pillars.title: 3 ways to assign teams
pillars.description: Live snake draft room where each player picks in real time. Instant random draw settled before kickoff. Balanced tier assignment that spreads strong and weak teams fairly.

pillars.title: Bonus predictions on every match
pillars.description: Group admin enables up to 5 bonus criteria: BTTS, half-time result, total goals over/under, full-time winner, or clean sheet. Each correct bonus stacks points on top of your score pick.

pillars.title: Streaks and custom scoring
pillars.description: Three consecutive correct picks unlock a streak bonus. Admins tune every point value — exact score, team win, clean sheet, streak threshold — to match their crew.

groupModes.title: Casual — Friends & Family
groupModes.description: Simple picks and random team assignment. Perfect for a family WhatsApp group or a quick office sweep. Turn on optional bonus criteria to spice things up.

groupModes.title: Friends Mode
groupModes.description: Live snake draft room, all 5 bonus criteria, streak bonuses, and 1v1 weekly rivalries. This is where the banter lives.

groupModes.title: League & Classroom
groupModes.description: Balanced tier draft, ELO ranking, survivor mode, and fully configurable scoring for schools, offices, and big groups.

scoringLayers.title: Exact score
scoringLayers.description: Full marks for nailing the precise scoreline. Correct winner earns +3. Goal difference adds +2. All three can stack on a single pick.

scoringLayers.title: Team ownership
scoringLayers.description: Your team's wins (+4 pts), every goal they score (+1 pt each), and clean sheets (+3 pts) accumulate across every match in the tournament.

scoringLayers.title: Bonus criteria
scoringLayers.description: Admin enables BTTS (+2), half-time result (+2), total goals (+2), FT winner (+2), or clean sheet (+1) on top of every match pick.

scoringLayers.title: Streak bonus
scoringLayers.description: Hit 3+ correct picks in a row and bank a streak bonus. Keep the run alive and the pressure on everyone above you.

index.retentionSection: Built to go viral in your group chat

engagementLoops.title: Share in one tap
engagementLoops.description: Private invite links work straight from WhatsApp, iMessage, or any group chat. No app download, no sign-up required to join.

engagementLoops.title: Admin controls everything
engagementLoops.description: Group admin configures draft type, enables bonus criteria, tunes point values, and sets the member cap. Every group runs exactly how the creator wants.

engagementLoops.title: No one gets left behind
engagementLoops.description: Bonus criteria open extra scoring windows on every match. Trailing players can close the gap with smart bonus picks even from last place.

privateDesign.title: Private by design. Every time.
privateDesign.description: Every group on FanQuin is invite-only. There is no public feed, no discovery, no strangers — just a unique 8-character code you share with exactly who you want.

steps.label: Share

steps.label: Play
steps.desc: Only invited players can see your group, your picks, and the leaderboard. Always.

seo.title: FAQ & Support · FanQuin
seo.description: Find answers to common questions about FanQuin and submit a support case if you need help.

faq.title: FAQ & Support
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions — and a direct line to our team when you need more.

items.a: FanQuin is a free-to-play social prediction platform. You create or join private groups with friends, pick match scores, own national teams through a live draft, and compete on a live leaderboard — all for bragging rights, no money involved.

items.q: How do I create a group?
items.a: Hit "Start your group now" on the home page, choose a competition and mode, configure your scoring, and share the invite link or code. Your group is live in under a minute.

items.q: How do I join a group?
items.a: Get an invite code from the group admin and paste it in the "Have a code?" box on the home page, or open the direct invite link.
Yes, 100% free. There are no premium tiers, no in-app purchases, and absolutely no real money or wagering involved.

Points depend on your group mode. In Friends mode (the default): exact scoreline = +5 pts, correct winner = +3 pts, correct goal difference = +2 pts. Bonus criteria like BTTS or clean sheet stack on top.

On each match the group admin can enable up to 5 bonus criteria: Both Teams To Score, total goals over/under, half-time result, full-time winner (standalone), or clean sheet. A correct bonus prediction earns extra points.
Each match has its own lock time (kickoff). You cannot submit or edit a prediction after the match starts.
Hit a consecutive correct-winner streak and earn bonus points every match after the threshold. The exact threshold and bonus depend on your group’s scoring config.
Each player in a group "owns" one or more national teams. Every time your team wins, scores goals, or keeps a clean sheet, you earn ownership points on top of your prediction score.

items.q: How does the snake draft work?
items.a: All group members join a live draft room. Players pick teams in turns; the order reverses every round (snake order). The draft locks when all spots are filled.
The system groups teams by strength (tiers 1–4) and distributes them so every player gets a fair mix of strong and weak teams. No live room needed.

items.q: Can I change my team after the draft?
items.a: No. Once the draft is completed the assignments are locked for the duration of the competition.

items.q: How many members can a group have?
items.a: The group admin sets the max member cap during creation (default 20, max 50 in league mode).

items.q: Can I be in multiple groups?
items.a: Yes. You can join or create as many groups as you like for the same or different competitions.
Share your group’s invite link or 6-character code. Anyone with the link can join as long as the group isn’t full.

items.q: What happens if the admin leaves?
items.a: Currently the group remains active. Admin transfer is on the roadmap for a future release.
FanQuin uses passwordless OTP login. Enter your email, receive a 6-digit code, enter it, and you’re in. No password to remember.
Yes, from your Profile page. Usernames must be 3–30 characters, lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only.

items.q: How do I delete my account?
items.a: Contact us at privacidad@fanquin.com with the subject "Ejercicios de Derechos ARCO" and we will process your deletion request within 20 business days.

items.q: FanQuin isn’t loading — what do I do?
items.a: Try a hard refresh (Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + R), clear your browser cache, or try a different browser. If the issue persists, submit a support case below.

support.title: Contact Support
support.subtitle: Can’t find what you’re looking for? Submit a case and we’ll get back to you.

groupPage.snakeExplainIntro: Every member picks exactly one team per round. The pick order "snakes" back and forth so no one always picks first or last.
groupPage.snakeExplainRule1: Odd rounds (1, 3, 5…): picks flow in order — 1st, 2nd, 3rd…
groupPage.snakeExplainRule2: Even rounds (2, 4, 6…): the order reverses — last, second-to-last…
groupPage.snakeExplainRule3: This repeats until every team has been assigned.
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow1: Round 1 →   A picks · B picks · C picks
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow2: Round 2 ↩   C picks · B picks · A picks
groupPage.snakeExplainExRow3: Round 3 →   A picks · B picks · C picks
groupPage.snakeExplainFair: The player who picks last in one round picks first in the next — eliminating any permanent positional advantage.
groupPage.bonusCriteriaHint: Select optional predictions users can make for extra points. Each one adds a new question to the prediction form.

btts.label: Both Teams to Score

ht_winner.label: Half-time Result

clean_sheet.label: Clean Sheet
clean_sheet.hint: +pts if user correctly predicts which team (or neither) keeps a clean sheet.

meta.title: How Scoring Works · FanQuin
meta.description: Full breakdown of FanQuin's prediction scoring, team ownership points, bonus criteria, streak and upset bonuses, and group mode comparison.

hero.title: Every point, explained
hero.description: FanQuin's scoring is fully modular: base predictions stack with team ownership, bonus criteria, streak bonuses, and upset rewards. Group admins configure all point values before the tournament kicks off.

base.title: Three tiers, fully stackable
base.description: Every match pick can earn all three tiers at once. Values shown are Friends mode defaults — every mode ships with its own calibration.

exact.label: Exact scoreline
exact.desc: You called the precise final score. Highest possible base reward — all three tiers stack automatically on a correct exact score.

winner.label: Correct winner
winner.desc: Right result (home / draw / away), wrong scoreline. Also awarded automatically when you hit exact.

diff.label: Goal difference
diff.desc: You predicted the correct goal difference even if the absolute scoreline was off.

base.stackNote: An exact scoreline unlocks all three tiers simultaneously — up to +10 pts in Friends mode.
base.lockNote: Predictions lock at kickoff. Late or missing submissions earn zero points.

bonus.title: Up to 5 extra predictions per match
bonus.description: The group admin enables any combination of these five criteria. Each active criterion adds an extra question to the prediction form — all points stack on top of base scoring.

btts.label: Both Teams To Score
btts.desc: Predict yes or no: will both teams score at least one goal?

ft_winner.label: Full-time result
ft_winner.desc: Pick the match outcome (home / draw / away) independently of the final scoreline.

ht_winner.label: Half-time result
ht_winner.desc: Predict who is winning at the half-time whistle (home / draw / away).

total_goals_over.label: Total goals over / under
total_goals_over.desc: Predict whether total goals exceed the group's threshold (default: over 2.5). Admin sets the exact threshold.

clean_sheet.label: Clean sheet
clean_sheet.desc: Predict which team — if either — keeps a clean sheet (home / away / none).

bonus.maxNote: All five active simultaneously yields up to +9 bonus pts per match, on top of base scoring.

ownership.title: Your teams score points every match
ownership.description: Teams are assigned at draft time. Every time a team you own plays, their in-match performance converts directly into your leaderboard points — no prediction required.

win.label: Team win
win.desc: Awarded each time your owned team wins a match outright.

goal.label: Every goal scored
goal.desc: Each goal your team scores in any match adds to your running total.

sheet.label: Clean sheet kept
sheet.desc: Your team concedes zero goals — awarded per match with a clean sheet.

ownership.draftNote: Ownership points accumulate across the full tournament schedule. Values shown are Friends mode defaults.

streak.title: Streak bonus
streak.description: Build a run of consecutive correct picks and earn extra points on every subsequent correct prediction until the streak breaks.
streak.note: Threshold and bonus amount vary by mode. Competitive mode rewards longer streaks more generously.

upset.title: Upset pick bonus
upset.description: After predictions lock, the system tallies who picked what across all group members. If you correctly called the minority outcome, you earn an extra upset bonus on top of your base points.
upset.formula: Bonus = upset_base_pts × (1 ÷ minority_pick_percentage).  A result chosen by only 10 % of the group can multiply the upset base by up to 10 ×. Upset base varies by mode (3 pts to 8 pts).

modes.title: Scoring defaults by mode
modes.description: The mode chosen at group creation pre-fills every scoring value. Admins review these defaults during setup — no manual tuning required.
modes.note: ELO rating affects leaderboard rank in League, Competitive, and Global modes only. Survivor lives apply in Competitive mode.

admin.title: What the group admin decides
admin.description: Before the draft starts, the admin configures these settings. Once the draft begins, the core scoring config is locked in for the entire tournament.

controls.label: Group mode
controls.desc: Sets the full scoring baseline — exact pts, team ownership pts, upset and streak values. Five modes from Casual to Global.

controls.label: Draft assignment method
controls.desc: Snake live room, random draw, or balanced tier distribution. Determines how national teams are allocated to each member.

controls.label: Max players
controls.desc: Caps how many members can join before the group closes and the draft begins.

controls.label: Bonus criteria selection
controls.desc: Enable or disable any of the 5 bonus criteria. Only enabled criteria appear on prediction forms.

controls.label: Bonus point values
controls.desc: For each enabled criterion, the admin sets the exact point reward (e.g. BTTS worth +2 or +3 pts).

controls.label: Total goals threshold
controls.desc: When the over/under criterion is active, the admin sets the exact threshold (default 2.5 — options include 1.5, 3.5, etc.).

admin.lockedNote: Mode, draft type, and scoring config lock once the draft starts. Bonus criteria can be edited while the group is still in the waiting phase.

snake.label: Snake draft
snake.desc: Players pick teams live in a real-time room. Pick order reverses every round — whoever picks first in round 1 picks last in round 2. Requires all members present. Maximum strategy.

random.label: Random draw
random.desc: Teams are instantly assigned at random. No scheduling needed — settled automatically when the group goes active.

balanced_tier.label: Balanced tiers
balanced_tier.desc: Teams are sorted into tiers (top / mid / underdog) and distributed so every player gets a roughly equal mix of strong and weaker teams.

timing.title: When to submit — and what happens if you don't
timing.description: Every match has a prediction deadline stored in the system. Once that timestamp passes, the form locks. No exceptions, no late entries.

timeline.label: Group active
timeline.desc: The draft is complete. Every match's prediction form is open from this moment.

timeline.label: Prediction window open
timeline.desc: Submit your score pick and any enabled bonus predictions at any point between group activation and the deadline.

timeline.label: Deadline — 1 hour before kickoff
timeline.desc: The prediction window closes exactly 1 hour before scheduled kickoff. After this timestamp, the form is locked — edits and new entries are rejected.

timeline.label: Upset percentages calculated
timeline.desc: Immediately after the lock, the system tallies who picked what. The minority-outcome percentage is used to compute the upset multiplier for every member.

timeline.label: Match played
timeline.desc: The match is synced from the live data feed. Scores, half-time results, and bonus details are verified automatically.

timeline.label: Points awarded
timeline.desc: Prediction pts + bonus pts + team ownership pts are posted simultaneously. The leaderboard and streak counters update in real time.

rules.label: No entry after the lock
rules.desc: Once the prediction_lock timestamp passes, submissions and edits are blocked at the API level. There is no grace period.

rules.label: All bonus criteria share the same deadline
rules.desc: BTTS, half-time result, total goals, FT winner, and clean sheet are part of the same prediction form and share the identical lock time.

rules.label: No prediction = 0 points
rules.desc: A missed deadline earns zero base points, zero bonus, and zero upset reward for that match. Streak counters are also not advanced.

rules.label: Time zone shown in your local time
rules.desc: The app displays the deadline in your device's local time zone. All internal storage is UTC.

cta.title: Ready to run your own quiniela?
cta.description: Create a private group, pick your mode, tune the bonus rules, and share a single invite link.
